title: Execute an Action with Trigger
overview: A #Trigger Executable is configured on Case update so that when a Case is closed, it automatically creates a follow-up Task assigned to the Case Owner with a due date 7 days out to verify customer satisfaction.
generalUseCase:
Use #Trigger to configure an automation that runs during save when 
a record meets specific criteria, automatically executing actions such 
as creating or updating related child records.
